allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a[''''name'''']\) for a in r.get\(''''assets'''',[]\)]")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "echo ''WSL Ubuntu works'' && cat /etc/os-release | head -4")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which go 2>/dev/null && go version 2>/dev/null; which kubectl 2>/dev/null && kubectl version --client 2>/dev/null; which kind 2>/dev/null && kind version 2>/dev/null; which make 2>/dev/null; which docker 2>/dev/null && docker version --format ''{{.Client.Version}}'' 2>/dev/null")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq make curl git 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq make curl git 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which make && which curl && which git")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'curl -sL https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.3.linux-amd64.tar.gz -o /tmp/go.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /usr/local/go && sudo tar -C /usr/local -xzf /tmp/go.tar.gz && /usr/local/go/bin/go version')

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'curl -sL -o /usr/local/bin/kubebuilder https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder/releases/download/v4.5.2/kubebuilder_linux_amd64 && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubebuilder && kubebuilder version')
